action.reasoning: Observation: Eval R2=0.5115, slightly below best (0.517). 0.68h remaining, 16 iters. Best.pt is the 47M ResMLP. Decision: train more epochs to push past 0.517 — with ~33s/epoch, I can do 30 epochs in ~17 min, leaving time for one more eval. Use cosine warmup from current state by retraining longer or continuing. Better: just run a fresh longer training (35 epochs) which should beat 0.517.
